10:1:1.m: Three special letters: Alif, Lam, Ra (opening of Surah)

10:2:1.m: was he/it? (questioning the state of something in لِلنَّاسِ عَجَبًا)

10:2:12.m: and give good news! (command to one person)

بَشِّرِ: give good news! (command to one person)

10:2:13.m: those who (plural, referring to believers in this ayah)

10:2:15.m: that/indeed (emphasizes the statement about قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ)

10:2:20.m: their Lord (with عِندَ: with their Lord)

10:2:26.m: a clear one/one who makes very clear

10:3:7.m: and the earth (as object of خَلَقَ/created)

10:3:19.m: any intercessor (after مَا مِن - there is not)

10:3:23.m: His permission (possessed by Him, coming after بَعْدِ)

10:3:26.m: your (all of you) Lord and Nurturer

10:4:7.m: indeed he/it (referring to Allah's promise mentioned before)

10:4:11.m: he returns/brings it back (referring to الْخَلْقَ/the creation)

10:4:12.m: so that he may give what is deserved (purpose of يُعِيدُهُ - He repeats it)

10:4:17.m: with justice (connected to لِيَجْزِىَ - to reward)

10:4:18.m: and those who (connected to ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)

10:4:20.m: for them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)

10:4:21.m: a drink (subject of لَهُمْ - they have)

10:4:24.m: and a punishment (connected to شَرَابٌ - 'a drink')

10:5:1.m: he (the one who made the sun and moon)

10:5:9.m: phases (of the moon that Allah set)

10:5:10.m: so that you all may know

10:5:16.m: Allah (the subject of خَلَقَ - He created)

10:5:17.m: that (pointing to what was mentioned before)

10:6:3.m: alternation/succession (of الَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ - the night and day)

10:6:6.m: and what (refers to things Allah created)

10:6:11.m: and the earth (in relation to Allah's signs)

10:6:13.m: for a people (who يَتَّقُونَ - are mindful)

10:6:14.m: they are consciously protecting themselves (from wrong)

10:7:5.m: our meeting (object of يَرْجُونَ - they hope for)

10:7:10.m: with/by it (feminine, referring to worldly life)

10:7:14.m: our signs/miracles/verses (that people are heedless of)

10:7:15.m: those who are heedless (3+ males, subject)

10:8:2.m: their place of shelter (subject of النَّارُ)

10:8:4.m: because of what (connects to يَكْسِبُونَ - they earn)

10:9:2.m: those who (plural relative pronoun, subject of ءَامَنُوا۟)

10:11:2.m: he makes something happen very quickly

10:11:4.m: for/to the people (object of يُعَجِّلُ - hastens)

10:11:9.m: to them (referring to the people mentioned in لِلنَّاسِ)

10:11:12.m: those who (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in context)

نَ: (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in context)

10:11:14.m: they hope (subject of يَعْمَهُونَ - they wander blindly)

10:12:5.m: he called upon us (when affliction touched him)

10:12:11.m: then when (connects to كَشَفْنَا - we removed)

10:12:20.m: any harm/hardship (being affected by مَسَّ - touched)

10:12:24.m: for the ones who exceed limits

10:13:11.m: and not (they were not going to believe)

10:13:14.m: like that (referring to how We destroyed previous nations)

كَ: (referring to how We destroyed previous nations)

10:13:16.m: the people (acted upon by نَجْزِى - we recompense)

10:14:1.m: then/next (connects to جَعَلْنٰكُمْ - We made you)

10:14:2.m: we made you all (into خَلٰٓئِفَ - successors)

10:14:3.m: successors (plural) (object of جَعَلْنٰكُمْ - we made you)

10:15:2.m: it (our clear signs) is being recited (to them)

10:15:6.m: he said (responding to those who don't believe in meeting Allah)

10:15:12.m: with a Quran (object of ٱئْتِ - bring)

10:15:16.m: change it! (as a strong command to change the Quran)

10:15:21.m: that (connects to أُبَدِّلَهُۥ - I change it)

10:15:24.m: of one's own accord (in relation to نَفْسِى)

10:15:25.m: my self/soul (in تِلْقَاءِ نَفْسِىٓ - of my own accord)

10:15:33.m: I fear (in response to قُلْ - say)

10:15:36.m: my Lord (subject of عَصَيْتُ - if I disobey)

10:15:39.m: great, mighty (describing يَوْمٍ - day, showing it follows another word)

ٍ: (describing يَوْمٍ - day, showing it follows another word)

10:16:6.m: I recited it (referring to the Quran)

10:17:1.m: so who/then whoever (subject of أَظْلَمُ - more unjust)

10:17:9.m: he strongly denied/rejected (the signs/verses of اللَّهِ)

10:18:10.m: and they say (about their false gods)

10:18:12.m: our helpers who speak for us (describes هؤلاء/these)

10:18:15.m: say! (a command from Allah to Muhammad ﷺ)

قُلْ: say! (a command from Allah to Muhammad ﷺ)

10:18:16.m: Do you (all) inform (Allah about something He doesn't know)

10:18:17.m: Allah (as the object being informed about)

10:18:27.m: and He is exalted (above what they associate with Him)

تَعٰلَىٰ: He is exalted (above what they associate with Him)

10:18:29.m: they join/associate (others with Allah in worship)

10:19:6.m: one (feminine, as a description of أُمَّةً/nation)

10:19:7.m: so they disagreed (after being one united community)

10:19:13.m: surely it would have been judged

10:19:16.m: in it (referring to what they disagree about)

هِ: it (referring to what they disagree about)

10:20:1.m: and they say (about the lack of a sign from Allah)

10:20:2.m: why not (questioning أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

10:20:16.m: the ones who are waiting (among مَعَكُم - with you)

10:21:3.m: the people (being given mercy by Allah)

10:21:7.m: severe hardship (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave them to taste)

10:21:15.m: Allah (the one true God) (subject of أَسْرَعُ - is swifter)

10:22:8.m: when (introduces the condition of being in ships)

إِذَا: when (introduces the condition of being in ships)

10:22:14.m: with/by a wind (describing how they traveled)

10:22:15.m: with a very pleasant/good (describing رِيحٍ - wind)

10:22:18.m: it came to it (wind came to the ship)

10:22:19.m: a wind (subject of جَآءَتْهَا - it came to them)

10:22:27.m: that they (object of ظَنُّوٓا۟ - they thought)

10:22:31.m: Allah (as the one being called upon)

10:22:32.m: those who are making (something) pure sincerely (calling upon Allah in this ayah)

10:22:33.m: for him/it (connected to دَعَوُا۟, they called)

10:22:35.m: if indeed (connecting to دَعَوُا۟ they called)

10:22:39.m: surely we will definitely be (responding to اللَّهَ)

10:22:41.m: those who are thankful (connected to مِنَ meaning 'among/from')

10:23:11.m: the people (as the one being addressed)

10:23:13.m: your (all of you) transgression (against أَنفُسِكُم - yourselves)

10:23:19.m: then (connecting what happened after Allah saved them)

ثُمَّ: then (connecting what happened after Allah saved them)

10:23:22.m: and then we will tell you all important news

10:24:10.m: with it (referring to the water that mixed with plants)

هِۦ: it (referring to the water that mixed with plants)

10:24:21.m: its beauty/decoration (being taken by the earth)

10:24:22.m: and she made herself beautiful or adorned herself

10:24:27.m: upon it/her (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)

10:24:28.m: he came to her/it (subject of أمرنا)

10:24:41.m: the signs, the proofs (being explained in detail by نُفَصِّلُ)

10:24:43.m: they think deeply (about the signs of Allah mentioned in this ayah)

10:25:1.m: And Allah (as the subject of يَدْعُوٓا۟)

10:25:2.m: He calls/invites (to دَارِ ٱلسَّلٰمِ - the Home of Peace)

10:25:5.m: of the peace (possessed by دارِ - home/abode)

10:26:11.m: those (pointing to something far) (subject of أَصْحٰبُ)

10:27:6.m: with its like (meaning: with a similar evil deed)

10:27:12.m: of Allah/God's (possessed by or connected to Allah)

10:27:16.m: it was covered (describes وُجُوهُهُمْ - their faces)

10:27:24.m: of the intense fire (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ/companions)

10:27:26.m: in it (referring to النار - the Fire)

10:28:3.m: all together (describing how something is done)

10:28:8.m: your (all of you) place! (what we say to them)

10:28:11.m: and so we separated completely (between them)

10:28:16.m: you all were (addressing the polytheists مَكَانَكُمْ أَنتُمْ وَشُرَكَآؤُكُمْ)

10:30:5.m: whatever, that which (with emphasis and lengthened pronunciation)

10:30:6.m: she sent ahead/forwarded (referring to نَفْسٍ - soul)

10:30:7.m: and they were sent back (to اللَّهِ)

10:30:9.m: of Allah (possessor of مَوْلَىٰهُمُ - their true protector)

10:30:11.m: of/to the truth (being returned to اللَّهِ)

10:31:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before مَن يَرْزُقُكُم)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before مَن يَرْزُقُكُم)

10:31:8.m: he possesses/controls (the hearing in this ayah)

10:31:16.m: and he makes (something) exit/brings out (connected to يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)

10:31:17.m: the dead (object of يُخْرِجُ - brings out)

10:31:19.m: of the living one (object of مِنَ)

10:31:23.m: then they will say (in response to قُلْ)

10:31:24.m: Allah (the one true God who will say this in response)

ُ: who will say this in response)

10:32:1.m: so that for all of you (pointing to اللَّهُ)

10:32:3.m: your Lord (referring to Allah as the true Lord in this ayah)

10:32:5.m: so what thing (comes after the truth)

10:32:10.m: so how (connects to تُصْرَفُونَ - you are turned away)

10:32:11.m: you (all) are being turned away (from the truth)

10:33:2.m: she/it became true (referring to كَلِمَتُ - the word)

10:33:7.m: they broke away from obedience (subject of لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ)

10:34:11.m: Allah (as the subject of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - He begins)

ُ: as the subject of يَبْدَؤُا۟ - He begins

10:34:17.m: you (all) are turned away (from the truth)

10:35:29.m: you (all) judge/decide (in this ayah, asking how you make your judgment)

10:36:17.m: they do/are doing (referring to the majority mentioned in أَكْثَرُهُمْ)

10:37:1.m: and what/not (connects to previous statement and negates كَانَ)

10:37:6.m: it could be fabricated (subject of كان)

10:37:15.m: and a detailed explanation (object of كَانَ)

10:37:20.m: from (connecting دُونِ with what comes after)

10:37:22.m: the worlds (object of رَبِّ - Lord of)

10:38:6.m: with a single chapter (object of command 'bring forth')

10:38:13.m: of the deity, of the god

10:39:2.m: they strongly denied/rejected (something) as false (subject of بَلْ)

10:39:3.m: with what (they denied without having full knowledge of it)

10:39:15.m: so look!/then observe! (command to Prophet ﷺ)

10:40:10.m: and your lord (subject of أَعْلَمُ - most knowing)

10:40:12.m: with the people who spoil or damage things (object of أَعْلَمُ)

10:41:3.m: then say! (responding to وَإِن كَذَّبُوكَ - and if they deny you)

10:41:4.m: for me (connected to عَمَلِى - my deeds)

10:41:7.m: your (plural) deed/action (in contrast to the Prophet's deed mentioned earlier)

10:41:9.m: ones who are free from/innocent of (referring to multiple people)

10:42:4.m: to you (object of يَسْتَمِعُونَ - they listen)

10:42:7.m: the deaf ones (who are being addressed in أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ - can you make hear)

10:43:6.m: you guide (addressing the Prophet ﷺ regarding الْعُمْىَ - the blind)

10:43:11.m: they see (referring to those who look at you)

10:44:6.m: anything (being acted upon by يَظْلِمُ - wronging)

10:44:7.m: and but indeed (connects contrasting statement to previous ayah)

10:44:8.m: the people (being acted upon by يَظْلِمُ - wrongs/oppresses)

َ: being acted upon by يَظْلِمُ - wrongs/oppresses

10:45:7.m: an hour (object of يَلْبَثُوا - they remained)

10:45:11.m: between them (referring to those who denied meeting Allah)

10:45:12.m: indeed/already (emphasizes يَحْشُرُهُمْ - He will gather them)

10:46:7.m: we will surely take you completely

10:46:12.m: a witness (of ما يَفْعَلُونَ - what they do)

10:46:13.m: upon, on, over (what يَفْعَلُونَ they do)

10:48:1.m: and they say/are saying (followed by مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ - when is this promise?)

10:48:7.m: truthful ones (describing 'you were' in إِن كُنتُمْ)

10:49:11.m: Allah (as the subject of شَآءَ - willed/wished)

10:49:13.m: of a community/nation (possessed by لِكُلِّ - for every)

10:49:22.m: they try to go forward (in relation to سَاعَةً/an hour)

10:50:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

10:50:8.m: during daytime (when Allah's punishment might come)

10:50:9.m: what (more emphatic) (asking about what يَسْتَعْجِلُ - they seek to hasten)

10:51:1.m: and then? (expressing disbelief about what comes after إِذَا)

10:51:2.m: when (followed by مَا وَقَعَ - it happens)

10:51:6.m: with/by it (referring to العَذَاب/punishment mentioned earlier)

10:51:9.m: you (all) were (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)

10:52:1.m: then (connecting what follows to what came before)

10:52:5.m: taste! (command to many people) (referring to عَذَابَ - punishment)

10:52:12.m: you all were (referring to those who did wrong)

10:53:1.m: and they ask you for news/information

10:53:7.m: indeed it/he (referring to أَحَقٌّ - is it true)

10:53:11.m: able to escape/overcome (lit: among those who can make [something] impossible)

10:54:11.m: and they kept (something) secret (acts on النَّدَامَةَ)

10:54:15.m: the punishment (what is being seen in رَأَوُا)

10:55:1.m: Now pay attention! (used to draw attention to what follows)

أَلَآ: Now pay attention! (used to draw attention to what follows)

10:55:3.m: to/for Allah (belongs what is in the heavens and earth)

10:55:8.m: Now surely! (used to draw attention to what follows)

10:55:9.m: indeed/truly (emphasizes that what follows is definitely true)

10:55:14.m: most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)

10:56:1.m: he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)

هُوَ: he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)

10:56:4.m: and towards him (you all will return to)

10:58:4.m: and by His mercy (referring to Allah's mercy)

10:58:5.m: so by that (referring to Allah's bounty and mercy)

ذٰلِكَ: that (referring to Allah's bounty and mercy)

10:58:7.m: he/it (referring to Allah's favor and mercy)

10:58:9.m: than/from what (object being collected in يَجْمَعُونَ)

10:58:10.m: they gather (what they are gathering is wealth/worldly things)

10:59:4.m: he sent down (subject of أَنزَلَ is اللَّهُ)

10:59:9.m: and then you all made (it into halal and haram)

10:60:11.m: Allah (as the object being spoken about)

10:61:7.m: from it (referring to the Quran being recited)

10:61:18.m: when (referring to the time you delve into it)

10:61:21.m: and what (connects to يَعْزُبُ - escapes/is hidden)

10:61:35.m: than (comparing with مِثْقَالِ ذَرَّةٍ - weight of an atom)

10:62:10.m: they feel sad (referring to أَوْلِيَآءَ ٱللَّهِ - the allies of Allah)

10:63:2.m: they believed (subject of يَتَّقُونَ - they fear Allah)

10:63:3.m: and they were (who believed in the previous ayah)

10:63:4.m: they protect themselves from harm (subject of الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)

10:65:4.m: indeed/truly/certainly (emphasizes ٱلْعِزَّةَ لِلَّهِ - might belongs to Allah)

10:65:7.m: all together (describes how something is done)

10:65:9.m: The All-Hearing One (subject of the sentence)

10:66:1.m: Now behold! / Indeed! (used to draw attention to what follows)

أَلَآ: Now behold! / Indeed! (used to draw attention to what follows)

10:66:14.m: from/of (connects دُونِ with what comes before)

10:66:21.m: the assumption (object of يَتَّبِعُونَ - they follow)

10:66:25.m: they guess without knowledge (subject of هُمْ)

10:67:7.m: in it (refers to الَّيْلَ - the night)

10:67:14.m: for a group of people who

10:67:15.m: they hear/listen (referring to a group of people)

10:68:8.m: for him/to him (connected to سُبْحٰنَهُۥ - glorified is He)

10:68:9.m: what/that which (refers to everything in السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)

10:68:18.m: any proof or authority (used in this ayah to challenge those who claim Allah has a son)

10:69:5.m: against (referring to inventing lies against اللَّهِ)

ى: extension of meaning to show opposition

10:70:9.m: the punishment (object of نُذِيقُهُمُ - we will make them taste)

10:70:11.m: because of what (connects to يَكْفُرُونَ - they disbelieve)

10:71:10.m: he was/existed (describing the state before إِن)

10:71:23.m: then (connects this command to the previous one)

10:71:25.m: let it be/may it be (jussive form after لا)

10:71:28.m: a source of confusion (object of يَكُنْ)

10:72:16.m: the ones who submit peacefully (مِنَ shows this word follows 'from/among')

10:73:6.m: in the ship (connected to فِى before it)

10:73:15.m: he/it was (the outcome of المنذرين - those who were warned)

10:73:17.m: the ones who are warned (those who received warning)

10:74:1.m: then (connects this part to what came before)

10:74:7.m: their people (referring to the messengers' people)

10:74:15.m: with it/by it (referring to what they denied before)

10:74:22.m: the transgressors (object of نَطْبَعُ - we seal)

10:75:11.m: and so they made themselves act great (arrogantly)

10:75:13.m: a people (object of كَانُوا - they were)

10:77:5.m: when (connecting to جَآءَكُمْ - it came to you)

10:78:3.m: in order to turn us away

10:79:3.m: bring to me! (command to many people)

10:80:7.m: throw! (all of you) (command to the magicians)

10:80:10.m: those who are throwing (in response to موسى's command)

10:81:4.m: Moses (the one speaking to the magicians)

10:81:8.m: the magic/sorcery (subject of what Musa is talking about)

10:81:9.m: indeed/certainly (emphasizing what Allah سَيُبْطِلُهُ will nullify)

10:81:11.m: he will make it invalid (referring to السِّحْرُ/the magic)

10:82:3.m: the truth (object of يُحِقُّ - what Allah establishes)

حَقَّ: truth (object of يُحِقُّ - what Allah establishes)

10:83:5.m: offspring (as a complete group, subject of آمَنَ)

ةٌ: (as a complete group, subject of آمَنَ)

10:83:11.m: Pharaoh (object of fear in مِن فِرْعَوْنَ)

10:83:14.m: he tests/persecutes them (Pharaoh persecuting the believers)

10:83:22.m: the ones who go beyond limits (those who are mentioned in this ayah as being excessive in their opposition to Musa)

ينَ: those who are mentioned in this ayah as being excessive in their opposition to Musa

10:84:3.m: O my people! (Musa calling out to his people)

10:84:5.m: you all were (addressing the people of Moses)

10:84:6.m: you all believed strongly (addressing multiple people)

10:84:9.m: put your complete trust! (command to a group)

10:84:12.m: those who truly submit (as the object of كُنتُم)

10:85:1.m: so they said (following what happened before)

10:87:6.m: you two (Moses and Aaron) establish places (for your people in Egypt)

10:87:9.m: houses (as the object being settled in)

10:87:15.m: and bring good news! (command to المؤمنين)

10:87:16.m: the believers (the ones receiving good news from بَشِّرِ)

10:88:3.m: our caring Master (being called out to by Musa)

10:88:6.m: Pharaoh (as the object of ءَاتَيْتَ - You gave)

10:88:13.m: Our caring master! (being called by Musa)

10:88:14.m: so that they make (others) lose their way

10:88:20.m: their wealth (referring to Pharaoh and his people)

10:88:24.m: so they will not (connected to يُؤْمِنُوا)

10:88:27.m: they see (until they see العَذَابَ الأَلِيمَ)

10:89:5.m: so you two seek to be straight

10:89:8.m: the path (object of تَتَّبِعَآنِّ - you two follow)

10:89:11.m: they know (those who لَا before it)

10:90:3.m: Israel (the name given to Prophet Jacob and his descendants)

10:90:16.m: that he (referring to the fact Pharaoh realized about Allah)

10:90:21.m: she believed (subject of قَالَ - he said)

10:91:4.m: before (as the subject in this phrase)

10:91:7.m: the ones who cause damage/harm (object of مِنَ)

10:92:1.m: so today (referring to the day of punishment)

يَوْمَ: today (referring to the day of punishment)

10:92:4.m: so that you become (purpose for saving)

10:92:6.m: behind you (as a sign for those who come after you)

10:92:7.m: a sign/miracle (object of لِتَكُونَ - for you to be)

10:93:5.m: a place that has been established

10:93:7.m: and we provided them with sustenance

10:93:9.m: of the good things (object of مِنَ)

10:93:12.m: until (connects to جَآءَهُمُ - came to them)

10:93:13.m: definitely came to them (subject of العِلْمُ)

10:93:19.m: on the day (when Allah will judge between them)

10:93:20.m: the resurrection (connected to يَوْمَ - Day of)

10:94:4.m: any doubt (that you have about فِى what)

10:94:5.m: from what (that we revealed to you)

10:94:7.m: to you (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)

10:94:10.m: they read/recite (referring to those who read الْكِتٰبَ - the scripture)

10:94:11.m: the book (object being read by يَقْرَءُونَ)

10:94:16.m: the truth (that has come to you from your Lord)

10:94:19.m: so not/then do not (connected to تَكُونَنَّ)

10:95:2.m: you definitely are/become (negative command: 'do not be')

10:95:4.m: those who (referring to those who denied Allah's signs)

نَ: (referring to those who denied Allah's signs)

10:95:5.m: they strongly denied/rejected (the signs of اللَّهِ)

10:96:2.m: those who (plural, referring to the disbelievers mentioned in حَقَّتْ عَلَيْهِمْ)

10:98:2.m: she was (referring to قَرْيَةٌ - a town)

10:98:5.m: and so it gave benefit to her

10:98:9.m: Yunus (Jonah) (object of إِلَّا قَوْمَ - except the people of)

10:98:10.m: when, after, as soon as (connects to ءَامَنُوا۟)

10:98:20.m: to, towards (connects to حِينٍ - a time)

10:99:4.m: surely would have believed (in response to لَوْ/if)

10:99:11.m: you force (addressing Prophet Muhammad ﷺ about الناس)

10:100:9.m: and he makes/puts (subject of يَجْعَلُ الرِّجْسَ - and he puts the punishment)

10:100:14.m: they use their minds (those who لَا do not)

10:101:1.m: say! (command to one person, followed by انظُرُوا)

ِ: ! (command to one person, followed by انظُرُوا)

10:101:2.m: all of you look! (commanding multiple people)

10:101:11.m: from/away from (connects قَوْمٍ to what comes before)

10:102:10.m: say! (command to يَنتَظِرُونَ - those who wait)

قُلْ: say! (command to يَنتَظِرُونَ - those who wait)

10:102:12.m: indeed I (speaking to مَعَكُم - with you)

10:102:14.m: from/of (with emphasis, connecting to next word)

10:102:15.m: the ones who wait expectantly (after مِنَ)

10:103:5.m: they believed (referring to the believers mentioned in وَٱلَّذِينَ)

10:103:6.m: like that, similarly (connected to نُنَجِّى/we save)

10:103:10.m: the believers (those being saved by نُنجِ)

10:104:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)

10:104:3.m: the people (as the main subject being addressed)

نَّاسُ: people (as the main subject being addressed)

10:104:6.m: in/within (connects شَكٍّ 'doubt' to what comes before)

10:104:13.m: you (all) worship (addressing the disbelievers who worship other than Allah)

10:104:23.m: that (connects to أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)

10:104:24.m: that I be/become (object of أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)

10:105:9.m: the polytheists (those who join partners with Allah)

10:106:3.m: from/of (connects دُونِ to what comes before it)

10:106:14.m: in that case/therefore (shows the result of فَعَلْتَ - you did that)

10:107:12.m: with any good (object of يُرِدْكَ - He intends for you)

10:107:14.m: one who sends back/prevents (of His favor)

10:107:23.m: The Most Forgiving One (as a Divine attribute of Allah)

غَفُورُ: Most Forgiving One (as a Divine attribute of Allah)

10:107:24.m: The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)

10:108:13.m: for himself (object of يَهْتَدِى - he is guided)

10:108:15.m: he completely lost the right path

ضَلَّ: he completely lost the right path

10:108:19.m: and not (negating 'I am a guardian over you')

10:109:1.m: and follow closely! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

ٱتَّبِعْ: follow closely! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

10:109:5.m: and be patient! (connected to وَٱتَّبِعْ - and follow)
